description: Curated enterprise skill bundles that translate donor-repo skill-pack ideas into AutoMindLab-owned operating patterns.

bundles.name: Runtime Operations Core
bundles.purpose: Bring a runtime from unknown state to reviewable host/worker health.
when_to_use: starting a new session in a drift-prone workspace
validating runtime ownership after topology changes
recovering from broken bootstrap or seeded workspace issues
guardrails: keep external channels on the host
do not claim runtime readiness without validators and runtime doctor proof

bundles.name: Operator Trust and Proof
bundles.purpose: Keep operator-facing changes explicit, reviewable, and backed by evidence artifacts.
when_to_use: changing operator manifests or approval policy
planning browser-proof capture for downstream admin surfaces
guardrails: retain proof artifacts for browser validation

bundles.name: Enterprise Email Ops
bundles.purpose: Govern runtime-owned mailboxes, domain routing, and human-visible email actions.
when_to_use: reviewing mailbox identity or domain-routing changes
adding a new downstream inbox surface
preparing live AgentMail setup or verification
guardrails: treat user-declared inboxes as non-production until live proof exists
keep outbound sends and replies under host review

bundles.name: Strategy and Governance
bundles.purpose: Evaluate donor capabilities, challenge decisions, and keep reusable platform boundaries intact.
when_to_use: capturing reusable operating lessons without creating drift
guardrails: translate donor patterns rather than copying donor ownership models
